variants.title: Mann Filter W 940/38 Oil Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 940/38 Oil Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 62.0 mm, Dimension C: 72.0 mm, Dimension G: 1-12 UNF, Dimension H: 141.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 147.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1"-12 UNF, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Donaldson P560693 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P560693 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P560693 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.

The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 56555 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 56555 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA35CC10
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 56555 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 96.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 95.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 72.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"-12UNF, Height 1 (H1): 147.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 145.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 7.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 147.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1"-12 UNF, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
